final_prompt.prompt:
Create a short-form video vertical cover for an esports monitor launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a minimalist premium aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must use rule-of-thirds composition with large title as focal point
Subject: must include the 8k GGU esports monitor product context
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-end tech atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a premium minimalist direction — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" (large, primary), "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" (secondary)
Constraints: must be eye-catching with large bold title as specified
Avoid:
